title: anthyllis vulneraria f. hegetschweileri
intro: Anthyllis vulneraria f. hegetschweileri is a flowering plant, a subspecies of the kidney vetch, a member of the pea family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits associated with Anthyllis vulneraria f. hegetschweileri include wound healing, anti-aging, and immune system support. Herbal preparations of the plant may include teas, tinctures, and infusions, and it is often used in traditional medicine to promote skin and tissue health.
